title: Dynamic FPS Reforged
description: Reduce performance consumption when the window is not focused
body:
Dynamic FPS automatically reduces the speed at which minecraft renders when it's not focused (to 1 FPS) or hidden (no renders at all). It also fixes a bug in Vanilla Minecraft that makes it take much more performance in the background than it should.

DISCONTINUED 1.16.5+ FOR ALL MOD LOADERS, GO TO THE ORIGINAL MOD PAGE INSTEAD!!

I remain open to any suggestions for updates, improvements or ports for other mods.

~~Download in [the releases section](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps-reforged/versions), on [GitHub](https://github.com/N4TH4NOT/Dynamic-FPS-Reforged), or on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-fps-reforged).~~ # Credits
